query:
SELECT 
  c.id AS claim_id,
  c.claim_number,
  c.incident_type,
  c.incident_description,
  c.vehicle_make,
  c.vehicle_model,
  c.vehicle_year,
  c.vehicle_registration,
  c.status,
  c.created_at,
  a.id AS assessment_id,
  a.estimated_cost,
  a.damage_components,
  a.damage_zones,
  a.reported_cause_label,
  a.physics_json,
  a.fraud_json,
  a.cost_json,
  a.causal_verdict_json,
  a.causal_chain_json,
  a.narrative_json,
  a.stage_output_json,
  a.repair_intelligence_json,
  a.cost_intelligence_json,
  a.evidence_bundle_json,
  a.key_facts_json
FROM claims c
LEFT JOIN ai_assessments a ON a.claim_id = c.id
WHERE c.vehicle_registration = 'AEX 6208'
   OR c.vehicle_registration LIKE '%AEX%6208%'
ORDER BY c.created_at DESC
LIMIT 1;
